mapper.select: SELECT sea_id AS seaId, sea_name AS seaName FROM sea_area ORDER BY sea_id ASC
SELECT species_id AS speciesId, species_name AS speciesName FROM species ORDER BY species_id ASC

SELECT r.rule_id AS banRuleId, r.sea_id AS seaId, s.sea_name AS seaName, r.species_id AS speciesId, sp.species_name AS speciesName, r.ban_start_time AS banStartTime, r.ban_end_time AS banEndTime, r.spec_require AS specRequire, r.punish_desc AS punishDesc FROM fishing_ban_rule r LEFT JOIN sea_area s ON r.sea_id = s.sea_id LEFT JOIN species sp ON r.species_id = sp.species_id WHERE 1=1 AND r.sea_id = #{seaId} AND r.species_id = #{speciesId}
AND ( SUBSTRING_INDEX(r.ban_start_time, '月', 1) * 1 <= SUBSTRING_INDEX(#{month}, '月', 1) * 1 AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(r.ban_end_time, '月', 1) * 1 >= SUBSTRING_INDEX(#{month}, '月', 1) * 1 )
SELECT gear_id AS gearId, gear_name AS gearName, is_allow AS isAllow, remark, punish_desc AS punishDesc FROM fishing_gear ORDER BY gear_id ASC

SELECT policy_id AS policyId, policy_title AS policyTitle, publish_unit AS publishUnit, publish_time AS publishTime, official_content AS officialContent, simple_content AS simpleContent FROM fishing_policy WHERE policy_title LIKE #{keyword} OR official_content LIKE #{keyword} OR simple_content LIKE #{keyword} ORDER BY publish_time DESC
